items.title: One click too many? 75% of parents fear their kids aren't making safe choices online
items.snippet: Quarter of primary aged children have shared their real name online - yet a fifth of parents and carers have never spoken to them about online privacy. Our new campaign Switched on to privacy helps parents have the same frank conversations about online privacy as they do about stranger danger and road safety
